description: Implement a compliance audit system for the HR database using Oracle PL/SQL triggers. Create a sequence named AUDIT_SEQ (start 1, increment 1, nocache) and a table named SALARY_AUDIT_LOG with columns AUDIT_ID (PK), EMPLOYEE_ID, CHANGE_TYPE, OLD_VALUE, NEW_VALUE, CHANGE_DATE, and CHANGED_BY. Develop a row-level trigger TRG_SALARY_AUDIT on the EMPLOYEES table to log BEFORE UPDATE changes to SALARY, JOB_ID, or DEPARTMENT_ID using change types 'SALARY', 'JOB_CHANGE', and 'DEPT_TRANSFER'. Create a row-level trigger TRG_PREVENT_MANAGER_DELETE on EMPLOYEES to prevent deleting managers by raising application error -20001. Verify the implementation by updating employee 200's salary to 5500, employee 105's department to 90, and employee 206's job to 'FI_ACCOUNT', then attempting to delete employee 100. Export the final SALARY_AUDIT_LOG to /home/ga/Desktop/audit_log.txt.
